result.stdout:
dotnet-hotspots  - Find the most frequently changed files in your repository

Usage: dotnet-hotspots [options]

Options:
  --<number>              Show top files, e.g. --50 (default: 30)
  --all                   Show all files including docs, configs and build artifacts
  -v, --version           Show version information
  -h, --help              Show this help message

Examples:
  dotnet-hotspots                    # Show top 30 code files
  dotnet-hotspots --50               # Show top 50 code files
  dotnet-hotspots --all              # Show all files, no filtering
